steps.title: Identify the main verb position
steps.content: After the subject “Land” and before the object “his technology,” the blank must contain the main verb of the independent clause, followed by a purpose infinitive.

steps.title: Choose the finite verb form
steps.content: An independent clause must have a finite verb—a verb form that carries tense. “Used” is the finite past-tense verb needed here. The other choices are non-finite forms (infinitives B and C, participle D) that cannot function as a main verb. A is correct.
